news.title: Iran war threatens to scramble the 'affordability' midterm
news.summary: Midterm election messaging on affordability could be undercut by the Iran war and related uncertainty. Midterm election message on affordability may be undermined by Iran war.

news.title: How China is challenging the U.S. to become the next great space power
news.summary: A new report warns that the U.S. could lose its dominance in space to China in the next few years. The report was published by the Center for Strategic and International Studies.

news.title: Oil surges 35% this week for biggest gain in futures trading history dating back to 1983
news.summary: The oil market is worried that Gulf countries will have to shut production if tankers are unable to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: Inside the booming business of wellness third spaces and membership clubs
news.summary: A growing number of consumers are seeking out third spaces and membership clubs surrounding wellness, to improve their health while also socializing. A number of third spaces are now available in the U.S.

news.title: FDA vaccine head will step down in April after string of controversial decisions
news.summary: Vinay Prasad is leaving his post as director of the Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research. He will be succeeded by Dr. Ravi Agrawal.

news.title: ‘My mother refuses to turn on the heat’: Will America’s war with Iran really push up our utility bills?
news.summary: "She is reading alarmist headlines about Iran in the newspapers," says a source close to the Iranian government. "She is worried about what she sees in the news," the source adds.

news.title: Spike in oil prices triggers talk of an economic doomsday scenario
news.summary: Another week of record gains could lift oil prices close to their all-time highs. That would invite talk of an economic doomsday. The price of oil has been rising for more than a year.

news.title: These 6 stocks could be major winners of an upcoming optics ‘supercycle’
news.summary: Optical components are becoming a critical chokepoint in AI infrastructure. Data-center buildout drives strong demand for more efficient data-transfer methods.

news.title: Trump is offering $20 billion in reinsurance for oil tankers stuck in the Strait of Hormuz. Here’s why it might not be enough.
news.summary: Supply disruptions in the Persian Gulf “are accelerating faster than expected” as storage options dwindle, analysts say. Production shut-ins could begin as early as next week, J.P. Morgan says.

news.title: ‘He has been emotionally abusive’: My father, 75, is on oxygen and destitute. What do I owe him?
news.summary: “He has less than $20,000 to his name and no income besides Social Security,” his attorney says. “He’s got nothing.” “I’m not going to let him get away with anything,’ he adds.
